page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a baseline frequency of 3.4 GHz. With a 1:1 ratio of vCPUs to physical cores, this instance provides dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading, ensuring consistent execution performance.

The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 36 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers for distributed workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high clock speed optimize performance for compute-bound tasks, minimizing resource contention. The 1:2 memory-to-vCPU ratio makes it highly suitable for workloads requiring intense CPU processing rather than massive memory footprints. Appropriate workloads include high-performance computing, batch processing, compute-heavy web serving, and CPU-bound simulation tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 64 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors clocked at 3.4 GHz with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core memory allocation, and features no local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 36 Gbps. Designed for high compute density, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency by providing dedicated, non-shared CPU resources for processing-intensive applications. It is suited for workloads such as high-performance computing, batch processing, and compute-heavy simulation tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores at 3.4 GHz, 128 GB RAM, and 36 Gbps network bandwidth for high-performance workloads.

tagline: A high-frequency compute instance featuring sixty-four dedicated physical cores and high-speed network bandwidth for intensive processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core
Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.4 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory with 2.0 GB per core
Zero local storage, requiring network-attached storage
Optimized for high-performance computing and batch processing
